services.title: Mobile Welding & Custom Metal Work | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Mobile welding and custom metal work in San Diego for gates, railings, security doors, brackets, hinges, and practical metal repairs.

hero.headline: Mobile welding for gates, railings, brackets, security doors, and custom metal repairs.
hero.subheadline: Thoughtful repairs and small fabrication built around how the metal actually failed.

services.intro: Broken metal rarely fails for no reason. I look at the load, leverage, alignment, and original design before deciding whether the right fix is a clean repair, added reinforcement, or a newly fabricated part. I handle gate and fence repairs, handrails, security doors, brackets, anchor points, and custom metal work with the goal of leaving the piece stronger, cleaner, and working the way it should.
benefits: Real welding and metalworking skill applied to the cause of the failure
Repair, reinforcement, and fabrication options explained clearly
Mobile service for gates, railings, security doors, and installed metalwork
Custom brackets, tabs, stops, plates, and small fabricated parts
Clean execution with fit, alignment, movement, and finish checked before I leave
servicesIncluded: Gate fabrication, alignment, and weld repair
Metal fence, hinge, latch, and frame repairs
Handrail and railing repair or replacement
Security door and security gate welding
Custom brackets, tabs, stops, and mounting plates
Anchor points, reinforcement plates, and structural metal repairs
Repair or recreation of damaged metal parts
Small custom fabrication for residential projects
process: Send close-up photos, a wider context photo, and rough measurements
I assess how the part failed and recommend repair, reinforcement, or fabrication
You receive a clear written estimate covering labor, materials, and the proposed approach
I complete the work, check alignment and movement, and walk through the finished repair
services.pricingNote: Most welding and custom metal jobs range from $350-$950 depending on access, materials, fabrication time, and finish work. I provide a clear written estimate before work begins.

services.title: Electrical Repair & Installation | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Electrical troubleshooting, GFCI upgrades, outlet and switch repair, light fixtures, and ceiling fan installation in San Diego.

hero.headline: Electrical troubleshooting and upgrades handled carefully from diagnosis through testing.
hero.subheadline: GFCIs, outlets, switches, fixtures, ceiling fans, and practical electrical repairs.

services.intro: Good electrical work starts with understanding the symptom instead of immediately swapping parts. I troubleshoot outlets, switches, GFCIs, fixtures, and ceiling fans, then explain what I found and what the repair requires. The work is completed carefully, connections are kept tidy and secure, and everything is tested before the job is wrapped up.
benefits: Diagnosis focused on the cause of the problem
Careful device selection, connections, grounding, and testing
Clear explanations without burying you in electrical jargon
Clean fixture and ceiling fan installations with thoughtful layout
Written estimates and approval before additional work is added
servicesIncluded: GFCI outlet replacement, upgrades, and troubleshooting
Outlet and light switch repair or replacement
Light fixture installation and replacement
Ceiling fan installation and replacement
Dead outlet, intermittent power, and device troubleshooting
Wet-area device and protection corrections
Dimmer, timer, occupancy sensor, and specialty switch installation
Minor wiring corrections at accessible boxes and devices
process: Describe the symptom and send photos of the device, fixture, or affected area
I test the circuit and devices to identify the likely cause
I explain the repair options and provide a clear estimate
The repair is completed, tested under normal use, and reviewed with you
services.pricingNote: Most electrical troubleshooting, repair, and installation work ranges from $275-$750 depending on access, diagnosis time, devices, and fixture complexity. Written estimate provided before starting.

services.title: Door Repair & Security Door Work | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Door repair in San Diego for sticking, sagging, rubbing, and hard-to-latch doors, plus slabs, locks, hardware, and security doors.

hero.headline: Doors that stick, sag, rub, or refuse to latch fixed at the source.
hero.subheadline: Door fitting, hinge and latch repair, lock installation, slab swaps, and security door work.

services.intro: A door can look simple while the real problem is hiding in the hinges, frame, slab, latch alignment, weatherstripping, or years of movement in the opening. I diagnose what is actually causing the bind or poor fit, then adjust, repair, or replace the right parts. The goal is smooth operation, even gaps, dependable hardware, and a door that feels solid every time you use it.
benefits: The cause of sticking, sagging, rubbing, or latch problems identified first
Careful fitting that protects the slab, frame, trim, and surrounding finish
Experience with interior, exterior, utility, and security doors
Hardware selected and installed for reliable everyday use
Final operation check for swing, latch, lock, clearance, and weather seal
servicesIncluded: Sticking, sagging, rubbing, and misaligned door repair
Hinge replacement, reinforcement, and adjustment
Latch, strike plate, handle, lock, and deadbolt installation
Interior and exterior door slab replacement and fitting
Security door installation, adjustment, and repair
Door closer and self-closing hardware repair
Weatherstripping, sweeps, and perimeter seal replacement
Minor frame, jamb, casing, and trim corrections
process: Send photos of the full door, hinges, latch area, and uneven gaps
I inspect the opening and identify where the alignment or hardware is failing
You receive a clear estimate and explanation of the repair plan
I complete the work and test swing, latch, lock, clearance, and seal
services.pricingNote: Most door and hardware work ranges from $225-$750 depending on the door, opening, hardware, and amount of fitting required. Written estimate provided before starting.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs & Fixture Installation | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Faucets, toilets, disposals, supply lines, shutoffs, traps, and practical plumbing repairs in San Diego with careful leak testing.

hero.headline: Fixture installs and plumbing repairs that stay dry and work the way they should.
hero.subheadline: Faucets, toilets, disposals, supply lines, shutoffs, traps, and common plumbing problems.

services.intro: Small plumbing problems can turn into expensive damage when connections are rushed or the underlying issue is missed. I handle fixture replacements and common repairs with close attention to shutoffs, seals, alignment, drainage, and leak testing. I also take the time to point out worn or questionable parts that could create the next problem.
benefits: Connections assembled carefully and tested under normal use
Clean fixture removal and installation with the surrounding area protected
Troubleshooting that looks beyond the most obvious leak
Clear explanation of parts, options, and any conditions discovered
Final leak, drainage, flush, and operation check before cleanup
servicesIncluded: Kitchen and bathroom faucet repair or replacement
Toilet removal, installation, reset, and common repairs
Garbage disposal replacement and connection work
Supply line and flexible connector replacement
Accessible shutoff valve repair and replacement
Sink trap, tailpiece, and under-sink drainage repairs
Leak diagnosis around fixtures and exposed connections
General plumbing fixture troubleshooting and upgrades
process: Send photos of the fixture and the visible plumbing below or behind it
I assess the problem, existing connections, and likely parts required
You receive a clear estimate and explanation before work begins
The repair or installation is completed, tested thoroughly, and cleaned up
services.pricingNote: Most faucet, toilet, disposal, and common plumbing repair work ranges from $225-$750 depending on access, parts, corrosion, and existing conditions. Written estimate before starting.

services.title: Tankless Water Heater Descaling | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Tankless water heater descaling, flushing, filter cleaning, and performance checks in San Diego to remove mineral buildup and restore flow.

hero.headline: Tankless descaling that clears mineral buildup and helps your heater perform properly.
hero.subheadline: A thorough flush, filter check, and performance review for routine tankless maintenance.

services.intro: San Diego's mineral-heavy water can build scale inside a tankless heat exchanger, reducing flow and forcing the unit to work harder. I connect a proper flush system, circulate descaling solution through the heater, clean accessible inlet filters, and check operation after the service. You get a clean maintenance visit and a straightforward recommendation for when the system should be serviced again.
benefits: Mineral buildup flushed from the heat exchanger
Water flow and heater response checked before and after service
Accessible inlet filter inspected and cleaned
Proper pump, hoses, and descaling solution used for the flush
Maintenance timing explained based on water conditions and system use
servicesIncluded: Tankless water heater isolation and system preparation
Descaling solution circulation through the heat exchanger
Fresh-water flush after descaling
Accessible inlet filter cleaning
Visual check of valves, hoses, and nearby connections
Post-service hot water and flow check
Maintenance interval recommendation
process: Send the heater brand, model, and photos of the unit and isolation valves
I confirm the setup and provide a clear service estimate
The unit is isolated, descaled, flushed, and returned to operation
I check performance and review maintenance observations with you
services.pricingNote: Most tankless descaling services range from $275-$450 depending on access, valve setup, unit condition, and service time. Written estimate provided before scheduling.

services.title: Drywall & Ceiling Repair | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Drywall and ceiling repair in San Diego for holes, access cuts, dents, cracks, texture blending, paint-ready finishes, and touch-up paint.

hero.headline: Drywall and ceiling repairs finished to blend into the room.
hero.subheadline: Holes, access cuts, dents, cracks, texture matching, and paint-ready finishing.

services.intro: A good drywall repair is built in stages. The patch needs solid backing, the joints need the right reinforcement, and each coat has to be shaped with the final wall or ceiling in mind. I repair everything from doorknob holes and anchor damage to larger access cuts and ceiling patches, then blend the texture and finish so the repair stops drawing attention.
benefits: Solid patching methods selected for the size and location of the damage
Careful feathering and sanding to avoid a visible mound around the repair
Texture blending for common San Diego wall and ceiling finishes
Floors, furniture, and nearby surfaces protected from dust and compound
Paint-ready finishing with touch-up painting available when practical
servicesIncluded: Small and medium wall hole repair
Larger drywall access cut and section repair
Ceiling patching and texture repair
Doorknob, anchor, dent, and impact damage repair
Crack repair and popped fastener correction
Texture matching and blending
Paint-ready sanding and finishing
Small-area primer and paint touch-ups
process: Send one wide photo and close photos showing the size, texture, and location
I assess backing, patch method, texture, drying time, and finish requirements
You receive a clear estimate and an explanation of the expected visit schedule
The area is protected, repaired in stages, cleaned, and reviewed when complete
services.pricingNote: Most drywall and ceiling repair jobs range from $175-$650 depending on size, texture, access, drying time, and painting. Written estimate provided before starting.

gallery.alt: Large kitchen ceiling opening before and after drywall and texture repair
Mechanical room framing and utilities before and after drywall finishing

services.title: Punch List & Move-In Repairs | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Punch list, move-in, move-out, rental turnover, and pre-sale repairs in San Diego. Bundle multiple small jobs into one organized visit.

hero.headline: Turn a scattered repair list into one organized, productive visit.
hero.subheadline: Move-in, move-out, rental turnover, pre-sale, and general home punch list repairs.

services.intro: A punch list is often the most efficient way to use a handyman visit. Send a numbered list with photos, and I can group the work by tools, materials, and sequence before arriving. I help homeowners, landlords, property managers, renters, and real estate professionals finish the small repairs that keep a property from feeling complete.
benefits: Multiple small repairs organized into one efficient scope
Numbered, itemized estimates that make approvals and priorities clear
Useful for move-ins, turnovers, pre-sale preparation, and deferred maintenance
Broad repair capability across doors, drywall, mounting, hardware, caulking, and fixtures
Final walkthrough against the original list so completed items are easy to verify
servicesIncluded: Door, hinge, latch, lock, and hardware adjustments
Drywall patches and small paint touch-ups
Caulking, sealing, and trim touch-ups
Cabinet, drawer, shelf, and closet hardware repairs
Light fixture, switch, outlet, and device replacements
Mirror, artwork, shelf, and household item mounting
Minor plumbing fixture and connection repairs
General move-in, move-out, rental, and pre-sale fix-up items
process: Send a numbered list with at least one clear photo for each item
I group the work, identify likely materials, and flag anything needing more information
You receive an itemized written estimate and can approve the full list or selected priorities
I work through the approved list efficiently and complete a final walkthrough
services.pricingNote: Most punch list and move-in repair visits range from $250-$950 depending on the number of items, materials, access, and variety of work. Written itemized estimate provided before starting.
